title: Girl With Headphones
about: Girl With Headphones refers to a photograph of a Black woman listening to music with Beats headphones as butterflies fly around her. The woman in the photo is named Kelci Ferguson, a member of the 2000s female rap duo Vistoso Bosses. The image was sourced from their 2009 music video for "Delirious," featuring Soulja Boy. It became a popular reaction image and GIF on social media sites like TikTok in 2025, and later trended as an exploitable when meme creators edited her face with Photoshop and AI to fit different emotions and contexts. The original image was commonly used to embody bliss through musical enjoyment. Girl with Headphones memes mostly appeared in TikTok comment sections as stickers. Notably, for Halloween 2025, influencer and comedian Quenlin Blackwell recreated the meme as her costume.
origin: On November 23rd, 2009, the music video for "Delerious (Soulja Boy Tell 'Em Version)" by Vistoso Bosses was posted to the VistosoBossesVEVO channel on YouTube,[1] gaining over 16.5 million views and 145,000 likes in 16 years. At the video's 17-second mark, Kelci Ferguson of the group is shown wearing Beats headphones as butterflies fly around her.
